title: Google Chrome Update Fixes 8 Security Vulnerabilities
context: Google released a Chrome update addressing eight security vulnerabilities, potentially impacting over 3.5 billion users worldwide. Some of these flaws are considered high severity and could allow attackers to execute malicious code or compromise user data if left unpatched.

title: Adelphi UK Ransomware Claim
context: DragonForce ransomware group listed Adelphi UK on Feb 16, claiming breach from Feb 11 intrusion. Victim has not confirmed encryption or data theft yet.

title: Apple Pay Phishing Targets Users
context: Sophisticated Apple Pay phishing scheme uses fake fraud warnings across channels to harvest payment details. Users urged to verify alerts carefully.

title: Barnhart Group PII PHI Exposed
context: Barnhart Group data breach exposes PII and PHI, affecting sensitive personal and health information.

title: Omax Autos Ransomware Attack
context: Auto components maker Omax Autos confirmed a ransomware attack on its IT infrastructure on March 27, 2026. The company is currently assessing the impact.

title: BreachForums Version 5 Data Breach
context: A breach of the 'Version 5' iteration of BreachForums exposed 340,000 unique email addresses, usernames, and argon2 password hashes on March 27, 2026.

title: CISA Adds Aqua Security Vulnerability to KEV
context: CISA added CVE-2026-33634 (Aqua Security Trivy Malicious Code) to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog on March 26, 2026, due to active exploitation.

title: Port of Vigo Ransomware Disruption
context: Spain's Port of Vigo was hit by ransomware on March 25, 2026, forcing a disconnect of digital systems and a shift to manual cargo management.

title: Accenture and Anthropic Launch Cyber.AI
context: On March 25, 2026, Accenture launched Cyber.AI, a solution powered by Anthropic's Claude to automate security workflows and scale AI-driven operations.

title: Royal Chemical Data Breach Reported
context: Reported on March 24, 2026, the Lynx ransomware group compromised Royal Chemical, exposing SSNs, financial data, and driver's licenses.

title: CISA Warns of Darksword Spyware
context: CISA alerted federal agencies on March 23, 2026, to fix vulnerabilities exploited by Darksword spyware on Apple devices and Craft CMS platforms.

title: LexisNexis Confirms Data Leak
context: LexisNexis confirmed a breach in early March 2026 involving the Reach2Shell vulnerability, resulting in the theft of customer metadata and support tickets.

title: 15 Million Medical Records Stolen in France
context: The French Health Ministry confirmed on Feb 27, 2026, that medical notes of 15 million people were compromised and leaked online by hackers.

title: Match Group 10 Million Records Exposed
context: Hackers linked to ShinyHunters claimed a breach of Match Group (Tinder, Hinge) in early 2026, accessing user records and transaction data.

title: Brightspeed Ransomware Affects 1M Users
context: Telecom provider Brightspeed suffered a ransomware attack in early 2026, impacting the personal data of over one million subscribers.

title: Odido Data Breach Exposes 6M Accounts
context: Dutch telecom Odido confirmed a breach on Feb 18, 2026, exposing names, bank account numbers, and passport details for 6 million users.
